# About Culture Things

> Private Sintra day tours with local experts. Two private-only routes (5–7 hours), max 4 guests, Lisbon pickup, 5.0 TripAdvisor rating, and free cancellation with 24 hours' notice. Pena Palace viewpoints, Atlantic coast, Cascais, and hidden beaches.

About Culture Things hosts premium private tours in Sintra and along Portugal's Atlantic coast. Every tour is private (never mixed groups), guided by local experts born and raised in Sintra. Book by messaging on WhatsApp to check dates, payment options, and booking details. Languages: English, Spanish, Portuguese.

## Tours

- [Sintra Complete Experience & Atlantic Coast](https://aboutculturethings.com/#tours): 7-hour private tour, €299 per private group (max 4). Historic Sintra, Pena area, Cabo da Roca, Cascais. Lisbon pickup included; palace tickets not included.
- [Sintra & Hidden Beaches Experience](https://aboutculturethings.com/#tours): 5-hour private tour, €275 per private group (max 4). Sintra hills, hidden coves, Azenhas do Mar. Lisbon pickup included.

## Key pages

- [Why choose us](https://aboutculturethings.com/#benefits): Private pacing, local expertise, and easy WhatsApp booking.
- [Experience gallery](https://aboutculturethings.com/#gallery): Six premium images — Pena Palace, Cabo da Roca, Azenhas do Mar, Cascais, Castelo dos Mouros, Quinta da Regaleira.
- [Reviews](https://aboutculturethings.com/#reviews): 5.0/5 on TripAdvisor — 6 reviews, all 5-star, displayed in full.
- [How booking works & FAQ](https://aboutculturethings.com/#faq): Five common questions about tours, booking, cancellation, pickup, and customization.
- [Book a tour](https://aboutculturethings.com/#final-cta): Message on WhatsApp to check availability.

- [WhatsApp +351 968 510 019](https://wa.me/351968510019): Primary booking channel.
